caption: A news broadcast features a split-screen presentation. On the left side, a man with glasses wears a dark suit, white shirt, and a red tie, appearing as a news anchor. On the right side, another man wears a patterned pink and black traditional garment and a matching pink cap. A blue graphic with a globe is positioned between them, featuring the text "PLUS POLITICS." A banner across the bottom displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The lower portion of the screen contains various links and logos, including "WATCH ON," "SUBSCRIBE," and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." As the sequence progresses, the man on the right speaks, with subtle changes in his facial expression and head position. The anchor on the left remains relatively still, facing the camera. The bottom text updates to include "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" and channel logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308."
